post_context.title: When I won't let AI draft the PRD
post_context.caption_hook: Everyone wants AI to draft the PRD. Fewer teams ask when a human should still own it.
themes: Political calls, tradeoffs, and risk need a human owner — not a polished AI paragraph.
AI helps when the decision is made; it hurts when it replaces tense conversations.
Pairs with CON-139: setup before AI vs sections you still write yourself.
post_context.cta_question: What PRD section do you never outsource — and why?
